tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: The politician's speech was so _________ that even his opponents applauded.
Lucy: Did you enjoy the film? Jake: Not really. The plot was quite _________ -- I guessed the ending after ten minutes.
After months of negotiations, the two companies reached a mutually _________ agreement.
The detective found a crucial piece of _________ that linked the suspect to the crime scene.
Mum: How was the school trip? Tom: Brilliant! The guide was very _________ and told us things we'd never heard before.
The _________ between the rich and the poor in that country continues to grow every year.
